name: Fabric Architect

name: Azure Solution Architect
description: Generate WAF-aligned Azure architectures with cost estimates, security checklist, and Bicep templates.

name: Agent Architect
description: Design multi-agent systems on Microsoft Agent Framework. Sub-agents, workflows, memory, eval.

name: RAG Designer
description: Design retrieval-augmented generation pipelines on Azure AI Search, Cosmos DB, and Fabric. Includes eval harness.

name: Demo Prepper
description: Prep customer-facing demos: scenario script, talk track, fallback plan, recovery moves when something breaks live.

name: Microsoft Pitch Builder
description: Generate customer-tailored Microsoft pitches aligned to MCAPS narratives: AI, Data, Cloud Migration, Security.
author: MCAPS Israel

name: Hebrew Content Reviewer
description: Review Hebrew technical content for clarity, RTL formatting, and proper handling of inline English terms.

name: LinkedIn Post (MCAPS Voice)
description: Draft LinkedIn posts for MCAPS sellers and engineers in builder voice. Hebrew + English.

name: Fabric Cost Optimizer
description: Audit Fabric capacity usage, identify hot artifacts, recommend SKU right-sizing or autoscale.

name: Azure Cost Audit
description: Audit Azure subscription spend, flag idle resources, suggest reserved instances and savings plans.

name: Copilot Studio Builder

name: Azure Security Review
